description: Response body for GET /v1/census/diff — compares the current census snapshot against a named baseline. available=false when no current snapshot or no baseline exists; diff carries the CensusDiff model_dump when available. The CensusDiff shape captures delta metrics between the two censuses (CensusDelta per field, HotspotChange list). Crosses the API boundary (ADR-056 D7 criterion 6). Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 (#366). Source: src/api/v1/schemas.py, class CensusDiffResponse.

available.description: True when a valid comparison could be computed. False when either the current snapshot or the requested baseline does not exist.

error.description: Human-readable explanation of why available=false. Null when available=true.

baseline.description: Name of the baseline used for comparison. Null when available=false.

diff.description: CensusDiff.model_dump() — a dict of CensusDelta objects (old_value, new_value, delta, percent_change) keyed by metric name, plus a hotspot_changes list (HotspotChange: path, old_count, new_count, delta, status). Null when available=false.
